data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-knots-347f-rename-skill-to-prompt (commit aa52fdec). Renamed Commands::Skill -> Commands::Prompt and SkillArgs -> PromptArgs in src/cli_agent.rs; renamed run_skill -> run_prompt and private resolvers in src/run_commands.rs; preserved kno skill as a hidden clap alias on kno prompt that emits the exact deprecation line to stderr. Updated TAXONOMY.md (removed skill/skills ambiguity flag) and added .changeset/rename-skill-to-prompt.md. New integration tests at tests/cli_prompt_command.rs cover canonical stdout, byte-identical alias parity, exact stderr warning, and help output excluding skill as a top-level command. make sanity passes: fmt + lint + 1138 tests pass + coverage 95.08% (above 95% threshold). Review artifact: branch worktree-knots-347f-rename-skill-to-prompt on origin.
